summary: Punchy, even‑level audience recording from the Palladium shows, but plagued by a glitch and missing Not Fade Away/Bird Song.
review: The tape captures two raw, high‑energy sets with clear audience ambience and a nicely balanced mix that many fans call outstanding. However, listeners note a noticeable glitch in "Me & My Uncle" and the complete absence of "Not Fade Away" and "Bird Song," which detracts from an otherwise solid document.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is generally praised but lacks specific performance highlights; recording quality is good overall yet suffers from a glitch and missing tracks, leading to an average‑ish combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Even levels and added punch praised; raw audience feel appreciated. Noted glitch at ~0:21 in "Me & My Uncle" and missing "Not Fade Away" and "Bird Song".

show_quality.setlist_flow: Two sets feel energetic; some reviewers think the sets may come from different sources, but overall the raw performance is well‑received.
